title: SURVEY - Health & Social Care | Stuart Anderson MP
meta_description: Stuart Anderson MP has launched a major review into the delivery of health and social care services in South Shropshire.
headings: h2: Stuart Anderson MP Marks World Cancer Day 2026
h2: Stuart Anderson MP Launches Health and Social Care Campaign
h3: Stuart Anderson MP South Shropshire
text_excerpt: SURVEY - Health & Social Care | Stuart Anderson MP Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Me South Shropshire Parliament News Contact SURVEY - Health & Social Care Tweet Stuart Anderson MP has launched a major review into the delivery of health and social care services in South Shropshire. As part of this, Stuart is inviting residents to respond to a new survey which seeks information on their experience of using local health and social care services. It is part of Stuart’s long term campaign to enhance public services in South Shropshire. Stuart wants understand the pressures they are under and support efforts to improve services like community hospitals. Stuart has said that he is determined to reduce rural disparities in the access and quality of these services to achieve better outcomes. News View From Westminster: February 2026 Thursday, 12 February, 2026 On Wednesday 4th February, I chaired a Westminster Hall Debate in Parliament on the state of postal services in rural areas. I was delighted to secure this debate, because I have seen over the last few months just how severely my constituents have been impacted by utterly unacceptable delays.
